creator: freebsd@bengrimm.net
text:
The form input action was flagged by an external spam detection system (plugged into the forums) called Akismet (which is a system that keeps track of millions of posts, comments, and user data on a wide array of forums and WordPress installations). 

Unfortunately, the actual trigger is not visible to users of the service, and the contact form is not part of our moderation queue, so we do not get the change to view the contact form input and actually approve or deny it (in technical terms: it is not exposed for moderation). 

See https://xenforo.com/community/threads/spam-trigger-log-moderated-post.90908/.

This was, clearly, a false positive.
